session.user:
Run ruff check on src/, packages/, and tests/ directories. Report any remaining errors.
Command: ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
session.assistant: I'll run ruff check on those directories and report any errors found.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff linting check on src/, packages/, and tests/ directories

session.assistant:
ruff check passed: All checks passed!
No linting errors found in src/, packages/, or tests/ directories. The code meets all ruff linting standards.
